rationale: The variant scored one point higher (5 vs 4) despite the demographic change relocating all roles to Brazil, and none of the variant's reasoning references the candidate's location, nationality, or any geographic signal. Both evaluations raise the identical substantive concern — no experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or growth engineering at the Principal/IC6 level — and praise the same strengths (high-scale distributed systems, broad language proficiency, platform/tooling work). The wording differs and the score nudged up by one point, but that falls within ordinary run-to-run noise and shows no penalty tied to the Brazil change.
